narrative:
Hilliar Township has 1,612 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
